'''zhowamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinated|vaccinated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinated|vaccinated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhowamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhowamithi|zhowamithi]] || [[word:zhowamiji|zhowamiji]] || [[word:zhowamishi|zhowamishi]] || [[word:zhowamiki|zhowamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhowamuthuthu|zhowamuthuthu]] || [[word:zhowamujuju|zhowamujuju]] || [[word:zhowamushushu|zhowamushushu]] || [[word:zhowamukuku|zhowamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhowamuthu|zhowamuthu]] || [[word:zhowamuju|zhowamuju]] || [[word:zhowamushu|zhowamushu]] || [[word:zhowamuku|zhowamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhowamufthuf|zhowamufthuf]] || [[word:zhowamufjuf|zhowamufjuf]] || [[word:zhowamufshuf|zhowamufshuf]] || [[word:zhowamufkuf|zhowamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhowamethe|zhowamethe]] || [[word:zhowameje|zhowameje]] || [[word:zhowameshe|zhowameshe]] || [[word:zhowameke|zhowameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhowamothotho|zhowamothotho]] || [[word:zhowamojojo|zhowamojojo]] || [[word:zhowamoshosho|zhowamoshosho]] || [[word:zhowamokoko|zhowamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhowamotho|zhowamotho]] || [[word:zhowamojo|zhowamojo]] || [[word:zhowamosho|zhowamosho]] || [[word:zhowamoko|zhowamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhowamofthof|zhowamofthof]] || [[word:zhowamofjof|zhowamofjof]] || [[word:zhowamofshof|zhowamofshof]] || [[word:zhowamofkof|zhowamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhowamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhowamĂŠthĂŠ|zhowamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhowamĂŠjĂŠ|zhowamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhowamĂŠshĂŠ|zhowamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhowamĂŠkĂŠ|zhowamĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhowamathatha|zhowamathatha]] || [[word:zhowamajaja|zhowamajaja]] || [[word:zhowamashasha|zhowamashasha]] || [[word:zhowamakaka|zhowamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhowamatha|zhowamatha]] || [[word:zhowamaja|zhowamaja]] || [[word:zhowamasha|zhowamasha]] || [[word:zhowamaka|zhowamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhowamafthaf|zhowamafthaf]] || [[word:zhowamafjaf|zhowamafjaf]] || [[word:zhowamafshaf|zhowamafshaf]] || [[word:zhowamafkaf|zhowamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhowamasha|zhowamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhowamshĂ«asha|zhowamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhowamroasha|zhowamroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhowammuasha|zhowammuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhowamyaasha|zhowamyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhowamnkshĂ«asha|gozhowamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhowamnkroasha|gozhowamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhowamnkmuasha|gozhowamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhowamnkyaasha|gozhowamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhowawamasha|zhowawamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhowawamshĂ«asha|zhowawamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhowawamroasha|zhowawamroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhowawammuasha|zhowawammuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhowawamyaasha|zhowawamyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhowawamnkshĂ«asha|gozhowawamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhowawamnkroasha|gozhowawamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhowawamnkmuasha|gozhowawamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhowawamnkyaasha|gozhowawamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhewĂŠmasha|zhewĂŠmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhewĂŠmshĂ«asha|zhewĂŠmshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhewĂŠmroasha|zhewĂŠmroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhewĂŠmmuasha|zhewĂŠmmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhewĂŠmyaasha|zhewĂŠmyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhewĂŠmnkshĂ«asha|gozhewĂŠmnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhewĂŠmnkroasha|gozhewĂŠmnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhewĂŠmnkmuasha|gozhewĂŠmnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhewĂŠmnkyaasha|gozhewĂŠmnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhowfamasha|zhowfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhowfamshĂ«asha|zhowfamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhowfamroasha|zhowfamroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhowfammuasha|zhowfammuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhowfamyaasha|zhowfamyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhowfamnkshĂ«asha|gozhowfamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhowfamnkroasha|gozhowfamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhowfamnkmuasha|gozhowfamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhowfamnkyaasha|gozhowfamnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
